title: bupleurum hamiltonii var. humile
intro: Bupleurum hamiltonii var. humile, also known as Chinese Thorny Knotweed, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum hamiltonii var. humile include reducing fever, relieving headache and body aches, and improving liver and kidney function. Bupleurum hamiltonii var. humile is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
